overview: A vibrant, full-featured university website for Rathinam College — showcasing admissions, courses, placement statistics with salary packages, campus facilities, and international collaborations. Designed to attract and inform prospective students, parents, and recruiters.
features: Hero banner with campus image carousel and key stats
About & College History with timeline and leadership profiles
Admissions section with downloadable brochures and FAQ
Courses catalog with filters by department and program type
Placements dashboard showing LPA packages, top recruiters, and alumni stories
Campus facilities gallery (labs, classrooms, library, sports, hostels)
International collaborations with partner universities worldwide
Contact and inquiry form with backend data storage
